parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Central error handler

Set as the **Error Workflow** for other workflows (Settings → Error Workflow). When any of them fails, n8n fires this and a red **Discord embed** lands instantly — failed node, error message, and a one-click link to the execution.

Native **Discord node** (Bot Token auth) posts to #n8n-alerts. One-time: attach the **Discord Bot API** credential to the *Send Discord alert* node.
